collected.policy_snippet: The personal data we collect includes name, gender, enterprise name, job position, postal and email addresses, phone number, login information (account and password), photos, and certificate information, etc...

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information for no longer than is necessary for the purposes stated in this Policy...
stored.purpose: To fulfill business purposes, provide products and services, and maintain records.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: After you deregister your account, we will stop providing you with products or services through your account and delete your relevant personal data, provided that deletion is not otherwise stipulated by special legal requirements.

shared.policy_snippet: Huawei shares your personal data with other partners, as described in this Policy, when services are provided by partners authorized by Huawei.
shared.purpose: To arrange shipment, provide services, or comply with legal procedures.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Photos are explicitly collected as personal data and are subject to sharing with partners and international transfers to jurisdictions with varying data protection laws. Deletion is contingent on account deregistration and legal requirements, with no automatic inactivity-based removal.

collected.policy_snippet: We may also obtain data by recording how you interact with our websites, products, or services.
collected.purpose: Improving our products and services through internal audits, data analysis, and research.
collected.legal_basis: Legitimate interests (improving products and services) or consent.
